oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Birds of the World Crossword Puzzle
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Jordan, Rick
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 51 Number 1 (January/February 2024).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.Continued from page 9 Scientific Test Turkey Here is an egg logger being programmed before being placed into an artificial shell. The programming tells the logger what sensors to use, such as light, temperature, and movements, and how often to record the data, whether many times a second or once a minute.The egg logger, battery, and shell for a great green (Buffon’s) macaw. Loretta with Connie “helping” build loggers at Sean Ragan’s Joint Venture Laboratories, in Austin, Texas 2 words Birds of the World Crossword Puzzle See more of Loretta in the digital issue of Watchbird at https://online.flippingbook.com/view/609446859/ Birds of the World Crossword PuzzleClick the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: AFA Watchbird; Vol. 51 No. 1 (2024): Watchbird January/February 2024; 10-11
